_comment: Live-transfer tool for the Policy PathFinder agent. This is a Retell LLM built-in 'transfer_call' tool — it is NOT created by the UpSurge provision spec. Add it to the agent's Retell LLM AFTER provisioning (Retell dashboard → the agent's LLM → Add function → Transfer call). The tool NAME must be exactly 'transfer_to_agent' to match the prompt.
name: transfer_to_agent
description: Warm-transfer the caller to a licensed insurance agent. ONLY call this after the caller has given a clear, explicit 'yes' to being connected right now.

transfer_option._transfer_option_note: Warm = the AI plays a short handoff to the agent before dropping off. Switch to {"type":"cold_transfer"} for a faster blind transfer if the team prefers.

public_handoff_option._note: Whisper message spoken to the RECEIVING licensed agent so they know it's a consented quote lead. {{city}} is injected from the HighLevel City field.
public_handoff_option.prompt: You're being connected to a homeowner in {{city}} who asked to be connected for a free home or cabin insurance quote. They've consented to the transfer — take it from here.

_on_failure_note: If the transfer fails or the line is busy, Retell returns control to the AI. The prompt handles this: the agent apologizes, captures a callback number, and ends — it does NOT re-attempt blindly.
